idea.title: Mirror Drift
idea.hook: Aim a single laser and bounce it off angled mirrors to strike enemies before they reach your core — one beam, infinite angles.
idea.hook_ru: Направьте один лазер и отражайте его зеркалами, поражая врагов до того, как они дойдут до ядра — один луч, бесконечные углы.
idea.prototype: Portrait laser-reflection strategy defense. One fixed emitter fires a continuous beam straight down; the player taps grid cells to place angled mirrors (tap to rotate +45deg, drag to move) and bends the single beam to ricochet onto waves of enemies advancing toward a core at the bottom. Each enemy that reaches the core costs 1 of 5 lives; a limited mirror budget forces re-aiming over spamming. 10 hand-authored escalating waves introduce a new enemy or optic on a ~60-90s cadence (walker -> darter -> armored[dwell] -> PRISM unlock[split beam] -> splitter -> ONE-WAY unlock -> shielded[hit from behind] -> PORTAL unlock[teleport beam] -> boss-wave mix), each wave-clear offers a 3-card upgrade (mirror budget / beam power / pierce / core HP / new optic), then endless score-chase. Procedural SFX + bespoke synthwave loop; action-gated tutorial coach; mobile-portrait-first.
idea.why_novel: laser-reflection optics defense — redirect a beam rather than place shooting towers; absent from our portfolio (which is saturated with tower-placement and merge-combat defenses). The hero verb is REFLECT/REDIRECT a single beam through space, a spatial-optics mechanic we have not shipped.
idea.non_timer_pressure: enemies advancing toward the core (each that reaches it costs a life; 5 lives) + limited mirror/optic budget (resource scarcity). No countdown clock.

sources.title: ADR 0002 — dual stack vanilla + Phaser, A/B per new build
sources.snippet: Built on Phaser as #2 of a 2-build run (#1 vanilla + #2 phaser); alternate stacks to A/B engagement.

synthesizer_brief: Laser-reflection strategy defense: bend ONE beam off player-placed mirrors to kill waves before they reach the core — a redirect/optics verb absent from our placement/merge-heavy TD portfolio, built portrait-first on Phaser with prism/one-way/portal optic unlocks and a boss-wave finale.
